tweets.topic: Bharti Airtel Brings OTP Fraud Alerts to Live Calls for Users
tweets.tweet: Bharti Airtel just launched real-time OTP fraud detection that alerts you during calls before scammers can trick you. So basically, your phone just became smarter than most of us at spotting shady calls. #AirtelUpdate #DigitalSafety

tweets.topic: vivo Launches the vivo T5 Pro with 9020 mAh Battery
tweets.tweet: Vivo just dropped the T5 Pro with a massive 9020 mAh battery that'll probably outlast your Netflix binge sessions. Indians finally get a phone that doesn't need life support by evening! #vivoT5Pro #BatteryLife

tweets.topic: Motorola Edge 70 Pro launching on April 22
tweets.tweet: Motorola Edge 70 Pro drops on April 22 with a 50MP camera and 144Hz display—expect flagship vibes without the ₹1 lakh+ price tag. Finally, a phone that lets your wallet breathe while still clicking stunning shots! #MotorolaEdge70Pro #SmartphoneLaunch

tweets.topic: Samsung Galaxy F70e 5G launch in India
tweets.tweet: Samsung just dropped the Galaxy F70e 5G in India at ₹16,999 — giving budget shoppers legit 5G without burning a hole in the pocket. Finally, affordable speed that doesn't feel like a compromise! #SamsungIndia #5GForAll

tweets.topic: Samsung Galaxy S26 series gets Quick Share support for iPhones
tweets.tweet: Samsung Galaxy S26 series now supports Quick Share with iPhones, making cross-device file transfers finally seamless. Indian users can finally stop the whole "send it via email" dance when sharing stuff with their iPhone friends. #SamsungGalaxy #TechNews

tweets.topic: Amazon India launches dedicated AI Store for consumer electronics
tweets.tweet: Amazon India just launched an AI Store featuring curated consumer electronics with personalized recommendations powered by machine learning. This means you'll actually find gadgets that match what you need instead of scrolling endlessly through 50,000 phone cases.

tweets.topic: Operation Octopus 2.0: 52 arrested in pan-India cyber fraud crackdown including 32 bank officials
tweets.tweet: Operation Octopus 2.0 just busted a massive cyber fraud ring with 52 arrests across India, including 32 bank officials involved in the scheme. Looks like our banking system is finally getting serious about keeping your money safe from inside jobs! #CyberCrimeAlert #IndianTech

tweets.topic: CBI cracks Rs 1.6 crore digital arrest cyber fraud case
tweets.tweet: CBI busted a Rs 1.6 crore digital arrest scam where cybercriminals impersonated cops to trap victims online. Stay alert—never share OTPs or bank details with anyone claiming to be law enforcement, even if they look legit on screen. #CyberSafety #StaySmart

tweets.topic: SBI warns customers of fake YONO app scam messages
tweets.tweet: SBI just flagged a massive fake YONO app scam where fraudsters are dropping fake messages to steal your login details and ₹lakhs. So basically, if YONO suddenly asks you to "verify" anything via random link, it's definitely not your friendly neighborhood bank.

tweets.topic: Perplexity launches Personal Computer with AI agents for Mac
tweets.tweet: Perplexity just dropped their Personal Computer — an AI agent that lives on your Mac and costs $20/month for early access. So basically, you're getting a digital assistant that actually understands your workflow instead of just looking confused. #AI #Mac
